task: Track and improve Headroom AST code-compression validity on modern Python files
wrong_result_signal: the corpus compression check reports invalid syntax rejections above the accepted threshold
gate_check: corpus compression check exits 0 AND invalid_syntax_rejection_rate <= 0.10
finished_state: Headroom AST compression keeps invalid syntax rejections at or below 10% on the representative corpus
constraints: do not weaken the syntax verifier
do not delete existing compression safety fallbacks
new corpus tests must fail if invalid syntax is emitted
